code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let input = io.read_to_end()
  let n = string.len(input)
  mut nums = [0, 0]
  mut count = 0
  mut i = 0
  mut start = -1
  while i < n
    let b = match string.byte_at(input, i)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    let is_ws = b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
    if is_ws
      if start >= 0
        let tok = string.substring(input, start, i)
        let v = match string.parse_int(tok)
        when Some(x)
          x
        when None
          0
        end
        if count == 0
          nums = [v, 0]
        else if count == 1
          nums = [nums[0], v]
        end
        count = count + 1
        start = -1
      end
    else
      if start < 0
        start = i
      end
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if start >= 0
    let tok = string.substring(input, start, n)
    let v = match string.parse_int(tok)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    if count == 0
      nums = [v, 0]
    else if count == 1
      nums = [nums[0], v]
    end
    count = count + 1
  end
  let a = nums[0]
  let b = nums[1]
  let r = a * a + b * b
  println("r=#{r}")
end
